3200.full_name: al-Taufayl bin 'Amr b. Tarif b. al-'Aas b. Tha'laba b. Salim b. Fahm b. Ghanm b. Daus b. 'Adnan
3200.bio:
Full lineage: al-Taufayl bin 'Amr( or al-Harith) b. Tarif b. al-'Aas b. Tha'laba b. Salim b. Fahm b. Ghanm b. Daus b. 'Adnan b.'Abdullah b. Zahran b. Ka'b b. al-Harith b. Ka'b b. 'Abdullah b. Malik b. Nasr b. al-Azd
At-Tufayl ibn Amr was the head of the Daws tribe before Islam began to spread in the Arabian Peninsula. He was very well known for his great generosity and good deeds. He used to feed the poor, comforted those in pain and he always granted shelter to refugees.
Al-Tufayl Bin Amr Al-Dausi visited Mecca soon after Prophet Muhammad(ﷺ) began to preach. He was warned by friends there to stay away from this self-proclaimed prophet who was saying dangerous things. His response was, “I’m an intelligent person, a poet, and I know the difference between good and evil. I’ll listen to him; if what he says is good I’ll accept it and if it is bad I’ll reject it.” Al-Tufayl visited Muhammad(ﷺ) in his home, where Prophet Muhammad(ﷺ) recited the Quran to him. Al-Tufayl concluded he had never heard anything so beautiful in his life, and converted to Islam. He returned to his hometown and preached his new religion to the people there. When Prophet Muhammad(ﷺ) later raided the Jewish community at Khaybar, Al-Tufayl and his converts joined him and were given a full share of the bounty.
Abu Huraira accepted Islam due to his preaching.

3201.full_name: 'Amr bin Tarif b. al-'Aas b. Tha'laba b. Salim b. Fahm b. Ghanm b. Daus b. 'Adnan
3201.bio: Full lineage: 'Amr( or al-Harith) b. Tarif b. al-'Aas b. Tha'laba b. Salim b. Fahm b. Ghanm b. Daus b. 'Adnan b.'Abdullah b. Zahran b. Ka'b b. al-Harith b. Ka'b b. 'Abdullah b. Malik b. Nasr b. al-Azd

3202.arabic: عمرو بن الطفيل بن عمرو الدوسي
3202.bio: Full lineage: 'Amr bin al-Taufayl bin 'Amr( or al-Harith) b. Tarif b. al-'Aas b. Tha'laba b. Salim b. Fahm b. Ghanm b. Daus b. 'Adnan b.'Abdullah b. Zahran b. Ka'b b. al-Harith b. Ka'b b. 'Abdullah b. Malik b. Nasr b. al-Azd

3203.arabic: الحارث بن الطفيل بن عمرو الدوسي
3203.bio: Full lineage: al-Harith bin al-Taufayl bin 'Amr( or al-Harith) b. Tarif b. al-'Aas b. Tha'laba b. Salim b. Fahm b. Ghanm b. Daus b. 'Adnan b.'Abdullah b. Zahran b. Ka'b b. al-Harith b. Ka'b b. 'Abdullah b. Malik b. Nasr b. al-Azd

3204.full_name: Jundub bin Ka'b b. 'Abdullah b. Jaz' b. 'Amir b. Malik b. Dahman al-Azdi al-Ghamdi
3204.bio: There are differences regarding his lineage (other names: Jundab bin Zuhayr or Jundub bin 'Abdullah or Jundab bin 'Ufayf). He is famous for killing the Magician.

3205.full_name: Junadah bin Abi Umayya(Kathir) al-Azdi al-Dausi
3205.bio: According to most scholars, he was a Tabi'

3210.full_name: 'Uthman bin Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman b. 'Abdullah b. Hamam b. Aban b. Yasar...n. Thaqif
3210.father_name: Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman
3210.bio: Prophet(ﷺ) taught him how to read Qu'ran. His mother saw the birth of Prophet (ﷺ).

3211.full_name: al-Hakam bin Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman b. 'Abdullah b. Hamam b. Aban b. Yasar...n. Thaqif
3211.father_name: Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman
3211.bio: He may not have met Prophet(ﷺ)

3212.full_name: Hafs bin Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman b. 'Abdullah b. Hamam b. Aban b. Yasar...n. Thaqif
3212.father_name: Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman
3212.bio: He may not have met Prophet(ﷺ).

3213.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman b. 'Abdullah b. Hamam b. Aban ..b. Thaqif
3213.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن أبي العاص الثقفى
3213.father_name: Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman
3213.bio: He may not have met Prophet(ﷺ).

3214.full_name: Aus bin Aus b. 'Abi 'Amr b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Wahb...b. Malik b. Hutayt b. Jusham
3214.father_name: Hudfayfa(Abi Aus or Aus) b. Hutayt
3214.bio: He was part of the al-Thaqif delegation.

3215.full_name: Fatima bint 'Abdullah, Umm 'Uthman bin Abi al-'Aas al-Thaqafi
3215.bio: She witnessed the birth of Prophet(ﷺ)
3215.spouses: Abi al-'Aas b. Bashr b. 'Abd Dahman

3216.full_name: 'Abdu Yalil bin 'Amr b. 'Umayr b. 'Auf b. 'Uqdah b. Ghira b. 'Ubda b. 'Auf b. Thaqif
3216.arabic: عبد ياليل بن عمرو بن عمير الثقفي
3216.bio: He was the leader of Thaqif delegation.

3217.full_name: Kinana bin 'Abdu Yalil bin 'Amr b. 'Umayr b. 'Auf b. 'Uqdah b. Ghira b. 'Ubda b. 'Auf b. Thaqif
3217.arabic: كنانة بن عبد ياليل بن عمرو

3218.full_name: Aus bin 'Auf b. Jabir b. Sufyan b. 'Abdu Yalil b. Saalam b. Malik b. Hutayt b. Jusham b. Thaqif
3218.bio: He was part of the al-Thaqif delegation and was one of the person who killed 'Urwa bin Mas'ud al-Thaqafi using Arrows before his conversion to Islam. He was forgiven by 'Urwa' relative after he became Muslim.

3219.full_name: Aus bin Hudfayfa(Abi Aus or Aus) b. 'Abi 'Amr b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Wahb...b. Malik b. Hutayt b. Jusham
3219.father_name: Hudfayfa(Abi Aus or Aus) b. Hutayt
3219.bio: He was part of the al-Thaqif delegation. There are various versions of his lineage.

3220.full_name: Abu Mulayh bin 'Urwah ibn Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf al-Thaqafi
3220.arabic: أبو المليح بن عروة بن مسعود الثقفي

3221.full_name: 'Asim bin 'Urwah ibn Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf al-Thaqafi
3221.arabic: عاصم بن عروة بن مسعود الثقفي

3222.full_name: Da'ud/Hubab bin 'Urwah ibn Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf al-Thaqafi
3222.arabic: داود بن عروة بن مسعود الثقفي

3223.full_name: Humam bin 'Urwah ibn Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf al-Thaqafi
3223.arabic: همام بن عروة بن مسعود الثقفي
3223.bio: His daughter married Yusuf bin al-Hakam b. Abi 'Aqil and give birth to al-Hajjaj bin Yusuf.

3224.full_name: Abu Murra bin 'Urwah ibn Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf al-Thaqafi
3224.arabic: أبو مرة بن عروة بن مسعود الثقفي

3225.full_name: Jubayr bin Hayya bin Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd b. 'Auf al-Thaqafi
3225.bio: He was considered as a Tabi'.

3226.full_name: Qarib bin ('Abdullah b.) al-Aswad bin Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd al-Thaqafi

3227.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Qarib bin al-Aswad bin Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr b. Sa'd al-Thaqafi

3228.full_name: Wahb bin 'Abdullah bin Qarib bin al-Aswad bin Mas'ud bin Mu'tab b. Malik b. Ka'b b. 'Amr al-Thaqafi
3228.arabic: وهب بن عبد الله بن قارب الثقفي
3228.mother_name: Umm Zara' bint Wab bin al-Aswad al-Thaqafiyya
3228.bio: It is very unlikely that he was a companion.

3229.full_name: Nafiy' bin al-Harith/Masruh b. Kulda b. 'Amr b. 'Ailaj b. (Abi Salma) 'Abdul 'Uzza b. Ghira b. 'Auf
3229.bio: نفيع بن الحارث بن كلدة بن عمرو بن علاج بن أبي سلمة واسمه عبد العزى بن غيرة بن عوف بن قيس

3230.full_name: al-Harith bin Kulda b. 'Amr b. 'Ailaj b. (Abi Salma) 'Abdul 'Uzza b. Ghira b. 'Auf
3230.bio: He was considered the Doctor of the 'Arab, Sumayyah was his slave girl.

3231.full_name: Nafi' bin al-Harith bin Kulda b. 'Amr b. 'Ailaj b. (Abi Salma) 'Abdul 'Uzza b. Ghira b. 'Auf
